portfolios.name: Best Overall (Composite Score)
portfolios.description: Highest composite score: ROI × liquidity × sell month × risk penalty — most well-rounded

portfolios.name: Max After-Tax Return
portfolios.description: Top stocks by after-tax ROI — highest yield, check Risk column for each stock

portfolios.name: Balanced Cap Mix
portfolios.description: 4 each from small / mid / large cap — diversified across market cap segments

portfolios.name: High Liquidity
portfolios.description: Top stocks by daily turnover — easiest to exit without moving the price

portfolios.name: Mid-2027 Exit (Jul–Oct)
portfolios.description: Peaks Jul–Oct 2027 — exit before year-end, redeploy for next cycle early

portfolios.name: Patient Hold (2028 exit)
portfolios.description: Peaks in 2028 — maximum LTCG window, full mean reversion cycle

portfolios.name: Small Cap Focus
portfolios.description: ₹100–₹1500 range — higher growth potential, higher volatility

portfolios.name: Low Risk Preference
portfolios.description: Same pool, sorted to show cleanest fundamentals first — Low risk stocks lead
